opinion.h4: UNITED STATES v. JACOBS, AKA "MRS. KRAMER" CERTIORARI TO THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE SECOND CIRCUIT No. 76-1193. Argued December 7, 1977 Reargued March 20, 1978 Decided May 1, 1978
opinion.p: Deputy Solicitor General Frey reargued the cause for the United States. On the brief were Solicitor General McCree, Assistant Attorney General Civiletti, William F. Sheehan III, and Jerome M. Feit.
Irving P. Seidman reargued the cause and filed a brief for respondent.
The writ of certiorari is dismissed as improvidently granted.
